Food journal: Photo, Calories, and Name + Cal label modes use the same solid caption panel and full-opacity white type on collage tiles and on list thumbnails (shared tokens with meal photo cards). Photo mode stays image-only on the thumb; list view hides duplicate title or calorie chip when the thumb already shows them.
Weekly banking: locked days keep their saved goal; bank spread now includes deficits and surpluses across remaining open days.
Weekly banking: optional setting to spread saved or overrun calories across remaining open days in the week.
AI uplift: Gemini estimates can be generated in-app from text or a photo using your saved API key.
AI quick log prompt and paste flow now better protect against double-counted servings.
